sub_groups.label: The wicked person — settled inner orientation of wickedness
Evil as the constitutional nature of the inner person
Abomination — divine revulsion at corrupt moral character and conduct
sub_groups.characteristic: Abomination: divine-revulsion judgment on moral character

sub_groups.label: Idolatrous abomination — will conformed to detestable false devotion
sub_groups.characteristic: Idolatrous abomination: the heart devoted to false gods

sub_groups.label: Iniquity — evil as an active inner process of scheming and harm-generation
sub_groups.characteristic: Iniquity as active inner scheming and evil generation

sub_groups.label: Blasphemy and defaming evil — wickedness flowing through the instrument of speech
sub_groups.characteristic: Evil expressed in speech: blasphemy, defamation, and perverse testimony

_instructions.note: Most terms assign all their verses to one sub-group. Exceptions are listed in per_verse_exceptions. For to.e.vah (mti_id=250) a full per-verse content review is required — use the keyword markers listed in to.e.vah_split_guidance to assign each verse to M10b-C or M10b-D.
_instructions.gate_check_required: CC runs _validate_cluster_phase5_distribution_v1_20260517.py after applying mapping. All sub-groups expected PASS.
